blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,180 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
